screenshots.screenshot_status: PENDING_DEPLOY — take after git push to vercel

flat_shading_all_materials.detail: flatShading:true confirmed on all 9 MeshStandardMaterial instances: rockBase, rockShadow, rockHighlight, oceanMat, towerMat, towerDark, towerRoof, notchMat, cloudMats(x8), skyMat, vegMat1, vegMat2, pathMat, foamMat. antialias:false on renderer. NoToneMapping preserves flat color accuracy.

tower_cylinder_geometry.detail: CylinderGeometry with 7 radial segments confirmed on all 4 tower sections + conical roof. No BoxGeometry tower. Sandy grey #8a8068 confirmed.

camera_position.detail: camera.position.set(-8, 18, 28) + lookAt(4, 2, -10) confirmed. High angle, tower right-of-center framing.

ocean_vertex_displacement.detail: PlaneGeometry(80,60,30,20) — 30x20 segments. Per-frame Y-displacement via posAttr update + computeVertexNormals(). flatShading creates visible wave facets.

polygon_clouds.detail: 8 BoxGeometry flat planes (w>>d) at varying x/y/z. Colors #3a4050 to #606878. flatShading:true. Rotated slightly per instance.

vegetation_4seg_cones.detail: ConeGeometry(r,h,4) — 4 segments confirmed = diamond/triangular shape. 18 instances on right cliff side. Colors #1a3020/#243818.

cliff_vertex_displacement.detail: displaceVertices() called on all 6 cliff BoxGeometry instances with amount 0.6-1.2. Random per-vertex jitter creates angular facets. 3 material tones present.

foam_patches.detail: 6 CircleGeometry(r,5) near cliff base at y=-1.8. Semi-transparent #ddeeff. flatShading:true.

no_shader_materials.detail: Zero ShaderMaterial instances in new file. Previously ocean + sky both used ShaderMaterial (smooth gradients). Now both use MeshStandardMaterial(flatShading:true).

no_white_scene.detail: scene.background = new THREE.Color(0x1a2030). FogExp2(0x1a2030). All objects have explicit non-white materials.

sea_spray_preserved.detail: SeaSpraySystem class preserved. 120 particles. PointsMaterial. Repositioned to cliff base (-6,0,-4).

api_compatibility.detail: initMainMenu(container):MainMenuResult signature unchanged. startDolly no-op preserved. dispose() with scene.traverse preserved. resize handler preserved.

severity_findings.item: Ocean wave displacement uses posAttr.getY(i) as base Z which is correct for PlaneGeometry in XY plane before rotation, but array indexing could be simplified by storing baseZ directly.
God ray sprite removed — correct for low-poly aesthetic, but main.ts should be verified it does not reference it (it does not — sprite was internal to initMainMenu).

overall: Cycle 25 menu rebuild PASS. All core low-poly elements implemented. flatShading:true is correctly applied everywhere — this is the architectural key. TS 0 errors. Bundle 116.2KB (-5.6% vs cycle 24). No regressions.
